Video.summary: In this Pro Men's Doubles match from the 2025 Minto U.S. Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, the team of Yates and Sobex faces off against Yu and Zwiren. The match is characterized by powerful shots, strategic dinks, and a high-energy atmosphere on the custom-designed Championship court. Commentary highlights the players' transition from singles to doubles and features details about one of the players, Thomas Yu, who previously played tennis at Johns Hopkins University.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren

Video.summary: It's Semi-Final Time on Day 9 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL)! This highly anticipated clash pits the Bengaluru Jawans, who finished top of the table (number one seed), against the Hyderabad Superstars, who narrowly snuck into the semi-finals (number four seed) after winning two matches the previous night. This is a classic 1 vs. 4 match-up, with the winner stamping their ticket to Championship Sunday.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1

Video.summary: May 2,2023 - the Peoria Pythons and the Tempe Tornadoes compete for the win - live at The Orchard!
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - May 2, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball - May 2, 2023 - AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball - May 2, 2023 - AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball - May 2, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: Dylan Frazier and Ritchie Tuazon meet Irina Tereschenko and Connor Pardoe in a high-stakes mixed doubles match at Picklebowl 2023. Set against the backdrop of this annual charity event, the match features four seasoned competitors known for their precision, quick reflexes, and court awareness. Expect fast-paced exchanges, smart teamwork, and big momentum swings as both teams battle for bragging rights and a good cause. Blending professional play with the spirited energy of Picklebowl, this match is a crowd favorite you won’t want to miss.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Video.summary: Experience the intensity of collegiate pickleball as the University of Arkansas "Hogs" face off against UT Dallas in a high-stakes pool play matchup at the NCPA 2025 Dallas Regional. This "best-of-seven" format showcases the full spectrum of the sport, including gender doubles, singles, and mixed doubles, with teams competing for a prize pool and a coveted bid to the National Championship in St. Louis.The match features elite collegiate talent, including Arkansas’ Alison Lee and Yasmine Humbert, who bring high-energy play and powerful forehands to the court. They are met with fierce competition from UT Dallas standouts Chloe Tu, Alex Hayek, and Austin Lee. Watch as the teams battle through momentum shifts and high-speed hand battles at the kitchen line, ultimately leading to a high-pressure sudden death tiebreaker.
Video.title: Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas

Image.alt: Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas
Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas
Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas

Video.summary: Get ready for a great singles match as Simone Jardim takes on Kristen Kopp at the Usopp National Pickleball Center. This venue, home to the Usopp Pickleball Academy, is a hub for lessons and training, making it an amazing facility for all things pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop
US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop
US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop

Video.summary: This Pro Women's Doubles match at the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships features the dynamic team of Anna Leigh Waters and Lee Waters facing off against the formidable duo of Walczak and Harris. The Waters team, known for their aggressive play and powerful shots, including Anna Leigh's unique heavy topspin cross-court backhand roll, aim to dominate the court. Walczak, a native of Poland with collegiate tennis experience, and Harris seek to overcome the Waters' early lead and challenge their expected path to the Championship court.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Video.summary: Watch an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age match featuring the team of Scott Fliegelman and Jillian Braverman against Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote. Scott Fliegelman is a top-10 ranked Senior Pro and co-founder of Boulder Pickleball. His partner, Jillian Braverman, is a well-known professional pickleball player. They face the team of Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote, a pickleball pro and trainer. This match showcases high-level gameplay between four skilled pros.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote

Video.summary: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Columbus Hotshots in a mixed NPL team match.
Video.title: Stingers vs Hotshots (Mixed)

Image.alt: Stingers vs Hotshots (Mixed)
Stingers vs Hotshots (Mixed)
Stingers vs Hotshots (Mixed)

Video.summary: The Coachella Valley Scorpions take on the Denver Iconics in a thrilling women’s National Pickleball League showdown from the 2024 season. From powerful baseline drives to lightning-fast net battles, both teams bring competitive spirit and polished teamwork to the court. Whether you're a seasoned fan or new to the NPL, this match showcases the rising talent and intensity of women’s pro pickleball. Every point matters — and momentum can shift in a flash.
Video.title: 2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics

Image.alt: 2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics
2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics
2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics

Video.summary: Mixed Pro split age - Simone Jardim & Jaime Oncins competing with Susannah Barr & Dave Weinbach in the second Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal 2

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal 2
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal 2
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal 2

Video.summary: The stakes are sky-high in this Mixed Senior Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships. Beth Bellamy and Rick Witsken team up with power and precision as they face off against the dynamic duo of Eva Welsher and Altaf Merchant. With each rally more intense than the last, the match showcases expert-level shot placement, quick hands at the kitchen, and the emotional highs and lows of championship pickleball.From thrilling volleys to strategic momentum shifts, this final clash is a must-watch for fans of senior pro competition. Watch as tempers flare, crowds roar, and legends battle for the ultimate title in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold – Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold – Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant
US Open 2023 – Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold – Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant
US Open 2023 – Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold – Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant

Video.summary: In this gripping quarterfinal from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, Helen Wilhelm and Anna Shirley face Suzanne LeBlang and Teresa Tarn in a thrilling three-game battle. Featuring powerful strokes, smart resets, and tactical momentum shifts, this senior pro women’s doubles match highlights both experience and finesse. Watch as the teams adapt and clash in a showcase of skill and strategy at the highest level.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Video.summary: On March 14, 2023 - the Surprise Stingers and the Tempe Tornadoes go head-to-head - live at The Orchard!

Video.summary: At the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, J.W. Johnson faces off against Brandon Lane in a hard-fought Men's Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal. With powerful rallies, strategic drops, and relentless pressure, this match highlights Johnson's athleticism and Lane’s grit as they fight for a spot in the finals. Recorded live on Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Video.summary: John Hedberg and Patrick Cote take on Jose Derisi and Scott Crandall in this Men's Senior Pro Backdraw Semifinal.

Video.summary: Lee Whitwell and Andrei Daescu take on Stefan Andren and Alix Truong in this Mixed Pro Split Age Semifinal match.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a high-stakes Tie 5 showdown. Pune United enters the arena hungry for their first points of the season, facing off against a confident Hyderabad Superstars squad coming off a fresh victory. Watch as top-tier athletes like Katie Morris, Shawn Mendes, and William Sobeck battle through a gauntlet of Women’s Singles, Mixed Doubles, and Men’s Doubles matches. With "hands battles" at the net and strategic "pickle plays" in full effect, every point is a testament to the speed and precision of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
